name: Product Hunt
submission_method: Online form — sign in, click 'Submit' > 'New Product', enter URL and details. Schedule launch up to 1 month ahead. Best launch day: Friday 8am PT. Free.
description: The leading tech product launch platform. Massive community of early adopters, investors, and tech enthusiasts. AI-specific categories and directories. Products that win 'Product of the Day' get significant visibility. 70% of top products include a maker first comment.

name: There's An AI For That (TAAFT)
submission_method: Online submission form at /submit/ page. Paid listing options available; free listing possible via monthly X/Twitter thread for indie makers. All submissions manually reviewed (1-2 day processing). Also: /get-featured/ for promoted placement.
description: The largest AI tool aggregator with 2.5M+ newsletter subscribers and 80M+ users. Primary source for hundreds of AI influencers and bloggers. Listings are permanent and continue driving traffic indefinitely. Better AI-targeting than Product Hunt — 100% AI-focused audience.

name: The Rundown AI
submission_method: Two options: (1) 'Recommend a Tool' Tally form for free editorial consideration, (2) 'Newsletter Feature' paid application via separate Typeform. Also paid sponsorship via sponsor.therundown.ai.
description: World's largest independent AI media publisher with 1.75M+ active readers (50%+ open rate, 46% C-suite/founders). Founded by Rowan Cheung. Daily newsletter covering AI news, tools, and product launches. Sponsored tools get permanent page on AI tool database (200k monthly views).
contacted_subject: Command Centre — Autonomous AI Agent OS

name: Ben's Bites
submission_method: Community submission — create free account on news.bensbites.com, submit a post/link. Top-voted posts get included in the daily newsletter. Works like Hacker News for AI. Also reachable via X @bensbites.
description: Popular daily AI newsletter with 100K+ subscribers. Known for friendly, accessible style. Community-driven news aggregation platform where users upvote submissions. Top stories get featured in the main newsletter. Strong with AI builders and startup community.

name: Easy With AI
submission_method: Online submission form at /submit-tool/ page. Free tool submissions accepted for review and directory listing.
description: AI tool directory and newsletter that curates and categorises AI tools for a broad audience. Accepts free tool submissions for review and listing. Good supplementary channel for discoverability alongside larger platforms.
